name: NewHydrogen, Inc.
business: NewHydrogen is a developer of clean energy technologies, currently focused on developing a thermochemical process to produce green hydrogen using heat instead of electricity. The company has not generated any revenues and is in the development stage, planning to license its technology to equipment manufacturers.
sellsTo: manufacturers of thermochemical hydrogen production component and delivery infrastructure

exposures.sentence: Our current focus is on developing a green hydrogen production technology that uses water and heat rather than electricity to produce the world s cheapest green hydrogen.

catalysts.event: Joint patent filing with UCSB for Coupled Multi-phase Oxidation-Reduction
catalysts.sentence: On March 5, 2025, we jointly with UC Santa Barbara filed a U.S. patent to protect intellectual property rights for Coupled Multi-phase Oxidation-Reduction for Production of Chemicals, application number 63/767,269.

catalysts.event: Joint patent filing with UCSB for Improved Materials for Thermochemical Looping
catalysts.sentence: On October 16, 2025, we jointly with UC Santa Barbara filed a U.S. patent to protect the intellectual property rights for Improved Materials and methods for Production of chemicals by Thermochemical Looping , application number 63/900,606.

catalysts.event: Amendment of research agreement with UCSB, extending term to November 30, 2026
catalysts.sentence: On November 17, 2025, the Company and the Regents of the University of California amended the Research Agreement to increase consideration payable to the University to $1,690,038. The effective date of the Amendment is November 17, 2025 and the term of the Agreement runs through November 30, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Goldman Sachs estimated the future market value of the green hydrogen economy at $12 trillion.
tamClaims.sentence: Goldman Sachs (in a 2022 report) estimated to have a future market value of $12 trillion.

tamClaims.claim: Green hydrogen market expected to reach $8.7 billion by 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a 2023 research report from Vantage Market Research, green hydrogen has an annual market size of more than $374 million in 2021, and is expected to hit $8.7 billion in 2028.
